ham.subject: Flipkart Order Confirmation – Order #123456789
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart.

Your order #123456789 has been successfully placed.

Order Details:
- Item: Wireless Mouse
  Quantity: 1
  Price: ₹499
- Item: Laptop Sleeve
  Quantity: 1
  Price: ₹799

Subtotal: ₹1298
Shipping: ₹99
Total: ₹1397

Shipping Address:
John Doe
123, Oak Street
New Delhi
India

Estimated Delivery: 3-5 business days

If you have any questions, contact us at support@flipkart.com.

Regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

spam.subject: Action Required: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

This is an official notice from Microsoft. Your Microsoft 365 password will expire in 24 hours. If you do not update your password before the expiration, your account may be suspended, resulting in loss of access to essential corporate data and services.

To secure your account and avoid interruption, please click the link below to reset your password:
<URL>

If you do not act within the given timeframe, you risk losing access to critical documents and could face potential security incidents.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
